title: Egyptian Flaky Pastry
description: A traditional Egyptian dessert made with layers of flaky pastry and a hint of indulgence.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the pastry into 6 equal pieces.
In a small bowl, mix together the sugar, rose water, and ground cardamom.
Brush the sugar mixture evenly over each pastry piece.
Fold the pastry pieces in half and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the pastry with butter.
Place the pastries on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
